title: Sweet Sticky Malaysian Pandan Leaves Stir-Fry
description: A sweet and gooey Malaysian dish featuring pandan leaves with candied peel, perfect for hangover-cure and suitable for kosher diets.

ingredients.name: 1 cup of diced candied orange peel
3 tablespoons of honey or maple syrup
1/4 cup of vegetable oil or coconut oil

instructions: Clean and soak the pandan leaves in water to remove any bitterness.
Heat a wok or large skillet over medium heat. Add oil until it coats the bottom evenly.
Add minced garlic and finely chopped onion, sauté for about 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add candied orange peel and pandan leaves; stir fry for about 5 minutes until slightly softened.
Pour in honey or maple syrup. Stir constantly to prevent burning and ensure the sauce thickens slightly.
Season with salt to taste. Cook for another minute to let flavors meld together.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
